patterns.name: Golden Ratio Composition System
patterns.description: Implements golden ratio, rule of thirds, dynamic symmetry, and Fibonacci grids for aesthetic element placement
patterns.artistic_impact: Creates professional, aesthetically pleasing compositions automatically

patterns.name: Spatial Hashing Collision Detection
patterns.description: Grid-based spatial partitioning system for efficient collision detection among thousands of elements
patterns.artistic_impact: Prevents overlapping while maintaining natural element distribution

patterns.name: Multi-Layer Flow Field System
patterns.description: Generates complex vector fields using layered sine/cosine waves with special features like spirals and vortices
patterns.artistic_impact: Creates organic, flowing patterns reminiscent of wind, water, or energy fields

patterns.name: Boids Flocking Behavior
patterns.complexity: O(n²) naive, O(n) with spatial partitioning
patterns.description: Implements Craig Reynolds' boids algorithm with separation, alignment, and cohesion behaviors
patterns.artistic_impact: Creates natural, emergent group movements and patterns

patterns.name: Penrose Tiling Algorithm
patterns.complexity: O(φⁿ) where n is subdivision depth
patterns.description: Recursive subdivision algorithm for creating non-periodic Penrose tilings using thick and thin rhombuses

implementation.pattern: Thick → 1 thick + 1 thin, Thin → 1 thick + 2 thin

patterns.name: Voronoi Cell Generation
patterns.description: Distance-based cell generation creating organic, territorial patterns
patterns.artistic_impact: Creates organic, cellular patterns like bubbles or territories

patterns.name: Euclidean Rhythm Generator
patterns.description: Generates evenly distributed patterns using Bjorklund's algorithm

implementation.example: euclid(16, 5) creates 5 hits evenly spaced over 16 steps

patterns.artistic_impact: Creates musically pleasing rhythmic patterns for spatial distribution

patterns.name: Dynamic Color Palette System
patterns.description: 20+ color palettes with rarity system and dynamic generation capabilities
patterns.artistic_impact: Ensures color harmony while providing vast variety

patterns.name: Wave Interference Pattern Generator
patterns.description: Simulates multiple wave sources with realistic interference patterns

implementation.formula: A * sin(d * f + φ) / (1 + d * k)

patterns.artistic_impact: Creates fluid, dynamic patterns like water ripples

patterns.name: Fibonacci Spiral Distribution
patterns.description: Creates natural phyllotactic patterns using golden angle (137.5°) distribution
patterns.artistic_impact: Mimics natural growth patterns like sunflower seeds

performance_techniques.name: Pre-allocated Arrays
performance_techniques.description: Avoids dynamic memory allocation during runtime

performance_techniques.name: Resolution Scaling
performance_techniques.description: Adapts quality based on complexity parameter

performance_techniques.name: Deferred SVG Generation
performance_techniques.description: Canvas for real-time preview, SVG for export only

performance_techniques.name: Cached Computations
performance_techniques.description: Stores expensive calculations like composition guides

creative_innovations.name: Feature Probability Engine
creative_innovations.description: Weighted random selection of visual features with rarity tiers
creative_innovations.uniqueness: Creates controlled variety while maintaining aesthetic coherence

creative_innovations.name: Hybrid Algorithm Mode
creative_innovations.description: Layers 2-3 algorithms with automatic parameter adjustment
creative_innovations.uniqueness: Produces complex, unique outputs impossible with single algorithms

creative_innovations.name: Musical Harmony Color Mapping
creative_innovations.description: Maps chord progressions to color relationships
creative_innovations.uniqueness: Creates color palettes with musical harmony principles

creative_innovations.name: Collision Strategy System
creative_innovations.uniqueness: Maintains visual characteristics of each algorithm type
